summary: Reposted Newsmax interview segment. A split-screen shows a man in a dark suit and glasses as a remote guest at left and footage of an office with people working at computer terminals at right. A lower-third reads 'NATIONAL UPDATE / FRAUD CASES SURGE NATIONWIDE,' with a 'LIVE' tag and a news ticker. The audio is the guest describing how immigration fraud permeates the system. The tweet text describes new USCIS special agents addressing fraud.

script.scene: Split-screen Newsmax interview: guest in glasses at left, office with workers at computers at right; chyron 'NATIONAL UPDATE / FRAUD CASES SURGE NATIONWIDE.'
